title: Cron log-architecture R-22 exceptions
description: Validates ${CLAUDE_HOME}/hooks/config/cron-log-architecture-exceptions.json — the allowlist of cron plist labels exempt from the R-22 wrapper-owned-logging default. Consumed by librarian capabilities/cron-log-architecture.sh. Authored by Plan 81 SP01 Session 16 (2026-05-10).

_schema_version.description: Schema version pin. Foundation skeleton ships version 1; future versions bump and consumers branch behavior.

exceptions.description: Exemption entries. Each entry declares a cron plist label that should NOT be flagged for R-22 wrapper-owned-logging. Foundation skeleton ships an empty array.

label.description: Plist label (e.g., com.claude-stem.foo). Matched against rendered launchd plist labels.

reason.description: Human-readable rationale for the exemption. Surfaced in librarian audit reports.
